purpose: Explicit route-to-reference mapping for North Star visual and functional QA. Capture reports are capture-health evidence only and must not be used as visual parity signoff.

routes.label: Command Center
routes.notes: Do not use prototype_cc.png for Command Center; that file is Control Center.
